title: I want to start my AI trading journey; Need your opinion
author: Intelligent_Monk1657
selftext:
I have been trading for a while now, and I’ve had my own fair share of bittersweet experiences. I've gone through various learning curves, but I can honestly say the era we are in right now offers a whole lot of winning possibilities in terms of tooling. I just read up on a guy on X who automated his trades with GetClaw.

I probed him a little further in the DMs, and he showed me how he did it, with quite a reasonable level of positive results. Shit, he even got rewarded with $200 just for participating in the tool's recent trading competition.

I intend on making a move with this tool too. I've heard quite good things about it and finally want to try it out. I'll probably start preparing for the next GetClaw trading competition.

Anyone have any thoughts on AI trading assistants, and have you used one before?
